name: Magic: The Gathering
description: Magic: The Gathering is Richard Garfield's groundbreaking 1993 invention — the trading card game that started a genre. Two or more planeswalkers tap five colors of mana from their lands to summon creatures, hurl instants, weave enchantments, and reduce opponents from twenty life to zero. Three decades, tens of thousands of cards, formats from kitchen-table commander to professional Mythic Championships. The original, still the standard.
